description: SSOT for character sheet generation. Industry full pack + thin video_ref subsets. Used by character_expand_sheets.py / character_full_sheet.py

global.quality_tags: cinematic still photo, realistic skin texture, highly detailed, sharp focus, natural color grading
global.global_negative: identity shift, different person, face morph, extra fingers, deformed hands, mutated face, bad anatomy, blurry face, watermark, text, logo, duplicate face, mannequin, doll, stick figure lines, openpose skeleton overlay

master.front_upper.instruction: medium close-up portrait, front-facing, neutral soft expression, looking at camera
master.front_upper.style_lock: plain light gray seamless background, even softbox studio lighting, no harsh shadows, no scene props
master.front_upper.negative_extra: profile view, extreme smile, action pose, busy background, dark moody lighting
master.front_upper.notes: Used by character_create for hero selection

master.full_body.instruction: full body standing character sheet photo, entire body head-to-toe in frame, feet visible, front view, arms relaxed slightly away from torso, neutral expression, orthographic model-sheet pose, not a close-up, not cropped, fully clothed
master.full_body.style_lock: plain light gray seamless background, even studio lighting, full-length fashion model sheet, ample headroom and foot room, casual street clothes
master.full_body.negative_extra: nude, naked, nsfw, bare breasts, close-up, portrait crop, headshot, cropped feet, cropped head, sitting, action pose, busy background, extreme close-up face
master.full_body.notes: Required source for ControlNet turnaround; use strong full-body wording

head.front.instruction: same exact person, head-and-shoulders turnaround sheet, front view face, ears and hairline clear, neutral expression, looking at camera
head.front.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, head turnaround model sheet
head.front.negative_extra: profile, three-quarter, full body, busy background

head.qf.instruction: same exact person, head-and-shoulders, three-quarter face turn to the right about 45 degrees, both eyes still readable, neutral expression, clear ear on far side partially visible
head.qf.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, head turnaround model sheet
head.qf.negative_extra: full front face, full profile, full body, busy background

head.side.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, head turnaround model sheet side profile
head.side.negative_extra: front face, both eyes equal, three-quarter cheat, full body, busy background

head.back.style_lock: plain light gray background, even studio lighting, head turnaround rear view
head.back.negative_extra: face visible, front view, full body, busy background

turnaround.front.negative_extra: three-quarter view, profile, sitting, dramatic pose, busy background, cropped feet, close-up only

turnaround.qf.negative_extra: strict front view, full profile, back view, busy background, cropped feet, close-up only
